title: phyllanthus coriaceus
intro: Phyllanthus coriaceus, also known as the Rough-Shelled Phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its extracts which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus coriaceus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Phyllanthus coriaceus is traditionally used to prepare herbal remedies, often in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
